name: Multi-Scale Evolutionary Cellular Gardens
description: A multi-state cellular automata system where growth rules slowly evolve based on local conditions and global audio input. Audio drives genetic pressure on the automata. Mouse introduces invasive species or protected zones. Organic, plant-like emergent structures that change their fundamental behavior over time.

params.name: Mutation Rate
params.description: How quickly the growth rules evolve over time

params.name: Species Competition
params.description: How fiercely species compete for resources

params.name: Fertility
params.description: Resource regeneration rate in the environment

params.name: Diversity
params.description: Number of distinct species behaviors present
